DomesticCup: EPL Championship, FA Cup, FA Community Shield
description: The English Premier League is the highest level of professional soccer in England and is widely regarded as one of the most competitive and popular leagues in the world. Founded in 1992, the league features 20 clubs from England and Wales competing each season for the Premier League title. Teams play 38 matches in a home-and-away format, with the top clubs qualifying for European competitions and the bottom three clubs relegated to the EFL Championship. Known for its passionate supporters, iconic stadiums, and world-class players, the Premier League attracts millions of fans across the globe.

foundedYear: Football League Second Division: 1892, Football League First Division: 1992, Football League Championship: 2004, EFL Championship: 2016
DomesticCup: EFL Championship, FA Cup, EFL Cup
description: The EFL Championship is the second-highest level of professional football in England and one of the most competitive leagues in the world. Featuring 24 clubs, teams compete in a 46-match regular season for promotion to the Premier League. The top two clubs earn automatic promotion, while teams finishing third through sixth battle in the Championship Play-Off Final at Wembley Stadium for the final promotion spot. At the other end of the table, the bottom three clubs are relegated to EFL League One. Renowned for its passionate supporters, historic clubs, and dramatic promotion races, the Championship is widely regarded as one of football's toughest and most exciting leagues.

Major League Soccer is the highest level of professional soccer in the United States and Canada. Founded in 1993 and beginning play in 1996, the league has grown into one of the largest soccer competitions in North America, featuring clubs from across both countries. MLS operates with a regular season followed by the MLS Cup Playoffs, where teams compete to be crowned league champions. The league is also known for its soccer-specific stadiums, passionate supporters' groups, and growing international profile. MLS clubs compete in domestic cup competitions and international tournaments, including the CONCACAF Champions Cup, while continuing to attract talented players from around the world.

mostTitles: Orlando City - (2 Titles), Louisville City - (2 Titles)
description: The USL Championship is the second-highest level of professional soccer in the United States and one of the most competitive leagues in North America. Founded in 2011, the league features clubs from across the United States competing in a regular season followed by the USL Championship Playoffs to determine the league champion. Known for passionate supporters, soccer-specific stadiums, and developing future MLS and international talent, the USLC offers an exciting matchday experience and plays a vital role in the growth of soccer across the country.

mostTitles: Austin II - (1 Title), Columbus Crew 2 - (1 Title), New York Red Bulls II - (1 Title), North Texas- (1 Title)
description: MLS NEXT Pro is a professional men's soccer league in the United States and Canada that serves as the official developmental league for Major League Soccer. Launched in 2022, the league provides a pathway for emerging players, coaches, and referees to progress to the highest levels of the game. Featuring MLS-affiliated clubs and independent teams, MLS NEXT Pro combines player development with competitive professional soccer, helping shape the future of the sport across North America.

DomesticCup: USL1 championship, US Open Cup, USL Cup
description: USL League One is the third division of professional soccer in the United States and a key part of the USL's player development pathway. Founded in 2019, the league features clubs from communities across the country competing in a regular season followed by the USL League One Playoffs. Known for passionate local support, growing rivalries, and opportunities for emerging players and coaches, USL1 continues to expand the reach of professional soccer throughout the United States.
